# Residue - Premium NFC Business Cards South Africa

Residue offers premium NFC business cards for professionals, founders, creatives, and brands who want to make a strong impression through minimal, durable, and instantly interactive identity tools.

## What Residue Does

Residue combines a physical NFC card with a digital profile experience. When someone taps a Residue card on a compatible smartphone, the card opens a digital profile page that can include contact details, company information, social links, and other business-relevant destinations.

The product is designed to feel premium in both material and interaction. The physical card acts as the first impression. The linked profile acts as the digital follow-through.

## Product Offering

- Premium NFC business cards
- Stainless steel card presentation
- Custom company logo card option
- Personal digital identity pages
- Company-linked profile presentation
- Contact-saving and link-sharing functionality

## Key Features

- Tap-to-share NFC functionality
- No app required for the recipient
- Works on modern smartphones with NFC support
- Share contact details, social links, and website links instantly
- Optional company section for business branding
- Customizable linked profile pages
- Premium visual direction focused on minimal, high-end presentation

## What Is an NFC Business Card?

An NFC business card is a smart business card that uses Near Field Communication technology to open a digital destination when tapped against a compatible phone. Instead of handing over only static printed information, the card can open a live profile containing contact details, business information, social links, and other important touchpoints.

This makes it easier to keep information current and easier for the recipient to act immediately.

## Why Choose Residue?

- Premium, design-led card experience
- Physical card paired with digital flexibility
- Fast sharing with a single tap
- Refined, minimal brand presentation
- Built for professionals who care about material quality and modern networking
- Tailored for use in South Africa

## South African Market Positioning

Residue is positioned for the South African market, with local relevance in pricing, communication, delivery expectations, and professional use cases. It is intended for users who want a more premium alternative to standard paper business cards and a more direct alternative to asking someone to manually search for social profiles or contact details.

## Ideal Use Cases

- Entrepreneurs
- Founders
- Sales professionals
- Consultants
- Creatives and freelancers
- Agencies
- Corporate teams
- Premium brand representatives
- Event networking

- NFC business cards

## Website

https://www.residue.cc/

## Brand Intent

Residue is built around quiet confidence, premium presentation, and controlled digital identity. The goal is not only to replace paper business cards, but to give professionals a more durable, modern, and memorable way to be discovered and remembered.
